name: Giants
gender: Seven male (Bouncer, Crusher, Eye-Brawl, Hot Head, Swarm, Thumpback, Tree Rex)One female (Ninjini)
story: The original Skylanders were the Giants, who united their powers to defeat the Arkeyan King . Ten thousand years ago, they banded together and fought for the freedom of Skylands against the Arkeyans, who ruled over Skylands with an iron fist. In a final battle against their adversary, the Giants were banished to Earth by the Iron Fist of Arkus , where they’ve been buried underground until recent days. As the years passed, the Giants became a myth. In Skylanders: Giants , the Portal Masters discovered and summoned the Giants back to Skylands to help the Skylanders fight Kaos before he could reawaken the Arkeyan army with the help of the Conquertron . In a race to reach the Lost City of Arkus , the Skylanders and their allies fought to keep Kaos from using the Iron Fist's powers, and the Giants remained in the team to help them in subsequent adventures.
